nodes.context: Mafia criminal organization of Sinti origin operating in Rome and Lazio.
Criminal organization in Rome, allied with Casamonica clan.
Mafia organization from Campania, allied and rival with Casamonica clan.
Mafia organization from Calabria, allied and rival with Casamonica clan.
Rival clan eliminated by Casamonica and Banda della Magliana.
Sinti family affiliated with Casamonica clan.
Sinti family affiliated with Casamonica clan.

edges.evidence_quote: The rise to the conquest of the illicit traffic of Rome, occurred, starting from 1970s, with the criminal alliance of the Banda della Magliana, and lasted until the 1990s.
edges.context: Casamonica clan allied with Banda della Magliana from 1970s to 1990s.

edges.evidence_quote: Clan helps the Banda della Magliana in eliminating the rival Proietti Clan which occurred between the end of the 1970s and the beginning of the 1980s.
edges.context: Casamonica clan helped eliminate the Proietti clan.
Camorra is listed as an ally of Casamonica clan in the infobox.
'Ndrangheta is listed as an ally of Casamonica clan in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Police operations that led to the arrest not only of members of the Clan, but also of members of other affiliated families of Sinti origin, such as the Spada and the Di Silvio
edges.context: Spada family is affiliated with Casamonica clan.

edges.evidence_quote: Police operations that led to the arrest not only of members of the Clan, but also of members of other affiliated families of Sinti origin, such as the Spada and the Di Silvio
edges.context: Di Silvio family is affiliated with Casamonica clan.
